News

Great success of our students in TUS!

26
						January

2021

The first graduates of our Faculty of Medicine were ranked 2nd out of 81 medical schools in the 2020-TUS assessment report.

ÖSYM Presidency published the 2020-TUS  first and Second Term Evaluation Report. The first graduates of Istanbul Okan University Faculty of Medicine ranked 2nd after Istanbul Cerrahpasa Faculty of Medicine among 81 medical schools in the success ranking.

Okan graduates ranked 8th in the clinical medicine success ranking in the report while they ranked 10th among 81 medical schools in the basic medicine success ranking.
